title: ATP Service Discovery & Default Handling

use_cases.name: Resolve ATP Services
use_cases.description: Reads EVOLVER_ATP_SERVICES env var (JSON array); falls back to a single default service entry built from EVOLVER_AGENT_NAME / EVOLVER_MODEL_NAME
use_cases.output: Array of ATP service descriptors [{title, description, capabilities, useCases, pricePerTask, maxConcurrent}]

use_cases.name: Get ATP Operating Mode
use_cases.description: Reads EVOLVER_ATP env var and maps to 'on' | 'off' | 'auto' (default: auto)

use_cases.name: Handle Incoming Order (Default)
use_cases.description: Generic fallback handler for ATP orders. Matches order.title / order.signals against keywords (review, bug, translat, localization, summar, digest) and returns canned result. Users can override via custom onOrder callback.
branches: default → generic 'Task processed by evolver agent.'

use_cases.name: Place ATP Order
use_cases.description: Consumer places an order with capabilities, budget, routing mode (fastest|cheapest|auction|swarm), verify mode (auto|ai_judge|bilateral), optional signals and min_reputation

use_cases.name: Submit Delivery Proof
use_cases.description: Merchant submits proof of task completion (result, output, pass_rate, etc.)

use_cases.name: Verify Delivery
use_cases.description: Consumer confirms delivery or triggers AI judge. action: 'confirm' | 'ai_judge'

use_cases.name: Dispute Order
use_cases.description: Raise a dispute with a reason (min 10 chars)

use_cases.name: Check Merchant Tier
use_cases.description: Query merchant reputation/tier for own or any node

use_cases.name: List Delivery Proofs
use_cases.description: List proofs filtered by role (merchant|consumer), status (pending|verified|disputed|settled), limit

key_relationships: index.js aggregates: hubClient + merchantAgent + consumerAgent + serviceHelper + defaultHandler
hubClient depends_on a2aProtocol: getHubUrl, buildHubHeaders, getNodeId
defaultOrderHandler is the fallback; overridable via custom onOrder in EVOLVER_ATP_SERVICES
resolveAtpServices <<include>> getAtpMode (caller decides based on mode whether to register services)
UC3 defaultOrderHandler <<extend>> UC5 submitDelivery (result feeds proof payload)
UC1 resolveAtpServices <<extend>> UC4 placeOrder (resolved services used as capabilities)

hub_transport.error_handling: All errors return { ok: false, error } — never throw

important_notes: EVOLVER_ATP_SERVICES env var (JSON array) is the primary override for service definitions. EVOLVER_ATP controls mode: 'on'|'off'|'auto'. defaultOrderHandler is purely synchronous and pattern-matched. hubClient is stateless; identity comes from getNodeId() per-call.
